validation.command: node --check src/cli.js; node --check src/control-plane/events.js; node --check src/runtime.js; node --check src/global-runtime.js
validation.summary: All T028 production entrypoints parse successfully.

controllerChecks: launchdeck events is wired through the CLI and reads bounded structured event history.
Targeted events history is filtered before applying the requested line limit, preserving target-specific history semantics.
logs --follow --json emits visible JSON Lines and uses a foreground CLI watcher that cleans up on process exit.
Streamed log lines are redacted before JSONL output.
safe clean preserves active run logs, latest failed logs, and failure-linked event evidence while still removing declared safe cache targets.
T027 no-kill reconcile semantics and lifecycle ownership tests remain green.
Leader process scan after validation found no recovery/log-follow fixture processes left.
acceptedResidualRisks: Cross-platform follow/retention behavior still needs final smoke beyond Windows-local validation.
Long-term retention defaults and pruning policy remain broader product-release work; this task preserves required evidence during safe clean.
followUpWork: T029 record US4 recovery and observability join validation in the ledger.
